candidates.why: Component of revenue; but there is an aggregate total line that should have priority for REVT.
Explicit aggregate of all revenues; best primary line for total revenue with consistent values.
Cost line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Cost line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Financial income, not operating revenue; exclude from REVT.
Interest income, not operating revenue; exclude from REVT.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not revenue; exclude from REVT.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue line; exclude from REVT.

candidates.row_label: Contract Liabilities - Long-Term - Advance Consideration & Progress Billings in Excess of Unbilled Revenue
candidates.why: Liability, not revenue line; exclude from REVT.

variables.notes: Use 'Total revenues' as the primary total revenue line; 'Contract revenues' is included as a backup component line in case the total is missing for some years.

candidates.why: Primary direct cost line matched against revenues; best representation of COGS.

candidates.row_label: Other Charter Hire and Operating Expenses
candidates.why: Operating expenses likely more overhead/mixed; less clearly direct COGS than 'Cost of Sales'.
Explicitly in SGA; should be treated as SG&A, not COGS.
General rental, typically SG&A/overhead; not core COGS.
Other operating overhead; not clearly direct COGS.
Depreciation/amortization, excluded from COGS per instructions.
Net other operating income/expense, not pure COGS.
Duplicate-type other operating line; not direct COGS.
Generic other expenses; should not be used as COGS when a clear cost-of-sales line exists.
Likely SG&A-type personnel costs; not primary COGS.
Net operating result, a subtotal; not a COGS component.
Non-operating; not COGS.
Overhead rental costs; more SG&A than COGS, and a clear COGS line exists.

variables.notes: 'Cost of Sales' is the clear direct cost line corresponding to revenues; other candidates are overhead, amortization, or subtotals.

candidates.row_label: Other Charter Hire and Operating Expenses
candidates.why: Likely part of operating overhead but label suggests mixed direct/overhead costs.
Explicit SG&A line; primary candidate for SG&A components with populated values.
Component of SG&A (labor) and clearly overhead; good SG&A component.
Additional SG&A-type overhead components; good SG&A component.
Other operating overhead; can be part of SG&A if no explicit SG&A line, but here an explicit SG&A exists.
Net other operating income/expense, includes income; less ideal as pure SG&A component.
Similar net other operating line; includes income/expense, not pure SG&A.
Personnel overhead; would be SG&A if used, but SG&A is already captured in aggregate.
Share-based compensation, typically SG&A, but may be embedded; line appears with no preview values.

variables.notes: There is an explicit, populated SG&A line 'Administration/Selling/General'; per hierarchy, use only this aggregate SG&A row for XSGA_COMPONENTS.
No research & development-related row (e.g., R&D, research, development) appears in the Income Statement or Balance Sheet previews; XRD is treated as structurally absent and set to 0.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary interest expense line net of capitalized amounts; best representation of interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; a component of interest expense, but narrower than the main net interest line.
Interest on tax/supplier credit; ancillary interest component.
Represents minority interests, not interest expense; should not be used for XINT.
Generic interest expense summary line; useful backup if the more specific net-of-capitalized line is missing in some periods.
Capitalized interest, not expense recognized in P&L; should be excluded from XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; secondary backup for interest expense.
Balance sheet minority interest, not interest expense; should be excluded from XINT.
Balance sheet minority interest, not interest expense; should be excluded from XINT.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority is given to the main net interest expense line. Generic 'Interest Expense' and specific lease/tax interest lines are included as fallbacks to capture interest expense across all years; capitalized interest and non-controlling interests are intentionally excluded.

candidates.why: Part of equity but not the full shareholder equity total; a component, not the target aggregate.
Narrow equity component of an instrument; not total book equity.
Narrow equity component; not total book equity.
Represents equity attributable to shareholders (owners), excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE per instructions.
Includes both shareholders’ equity and non-controlling interests; less preferred than owner-only equity since a separate NCI line exists.

variables.notes: 'Shareholders equity' represents equity attributable to owners/parent and excludes non-controlling interests, which are reported separately; this matches the desired BE definition.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to NCI; not the balance sheet amount but confirms the presence of minority interests.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; primary target for MIB.
Alternate label for non-controlling interests on balance sheet with same values; good backup.
Income statement minority interest allocation; not the stock of equity, but related.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure before NCI; not an NCI equity amount.

variables.notes: Use balance sheet non-controlling interest lines to capture minority equity for the BE+MIB denominator. 'Non-controlling interests' is primary, with 'Minority Interest' as a backup label for other periods.
